SavedReconciliation.title: Saved Reconciliation
SavedReconciliation.description: A locked or saved reconciliation session (daily or monthly) for historical inspection

id.description: Unique identifier of the saved record

name.description: A human-friendly label for this saved record

type.description: Whether this is a daily or monthly reconciliation

date.description: The date (YYYY-MM-DD) or month (YYYY-MM) of this reconciliation

timestamp.description: Unix millisecond timestamp of when this record was saved

grandTotals.description: The aggregated totals for quick inspection

items.description: List of reconciled stock items matching the required columns layout

saved_reconciliations/{reconciliationId}.description: Collection storing historical locked stock reconciliation records
